hooks.command: terminal-notifier -group "claude-$$" -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "Input Required - $(basename $PWD)" -message 'Waiting for your input' -sound 'default' 2>/dev/null; printf '\a' > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; exit 0

terminal-notifier -group "claude-$$" -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "Permission Required - $(basename $PWD)" -message 'Needs your approval' -sound 'default' 2>/dev/null; printf '\a' > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/|rm\s+-rf\s+~|rm\s+-rf\s+\$HOME'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf on root/home detected. Use trash instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*--force.*\s+(main|master)|git\s+push\s+-f.*\s+(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: force push to main/master. Use a feature branch.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
